case_title: AETNA FINANCE COMPANY, INC DBA ITT FINANCIAL VS BULFA PORFERIA V

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION DEC-06-1991, CONTINUED BY COURT TO JAN-10-1992 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 06

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AETNA FINANCE COMPANY, INC DBA ITT FINANCIAL SERVICES (SF1) RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BULFA PORFERIA V $2,480.00 PRINCIPAL, $46.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,526.00, PAST DUE PAYMENTS ONLY. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

OEX DISPOSITION, CALENDAR OF OCT-05-1992, CONTINUED FROM OCT-05-1992 TO NOV-09-1992 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 05 AS TO DEFENDANT BULFA PORFERIA V
